title: Haigang District Mayor Yun Xinsheng led a spring observation group to conduct an on-site investigation of the city's key project Tianhui E-commerce Industrial Park
contentHtml:
On April 16, Haigang District Mayor Yun Xinsheng led a spring observation group to conduct an on-site investigation of Tianhui E-commerce Industrial Park, a key project in the city. Accompanying observation units: District Government Office, Development and Reform Bureau, Housing and Urban-Rural Development Bureau, Urban Management and Law Enforcement Bureau, Transportation Bureau, Haigang Ecological Environment Branch, the main responsible comrades of Donggang Town, Haiyang Town, Haigang Town, and the responsible comrades of the Haigang Economic Development Zone. Comrade in charge of the District Government Inspection Office.

After listening to the project introduction of the Tianhui E-commerce Industrial Park project and the project construction progress report by Du Shuang, President of Tianhui Plastic Group, Yun Xinsheng pointed out that the Tianhui E-commerce Industrial Park project has a huge radiating and driving effect on the economic development of the Haigang District and is of great significance to the overall improvement of the Haigang District. The government should provide full support. All levels and departments must attach great importance to it and make every effort to ensure that project construction progresses steadily and rapidly.
titleZh: 海港区区长贠欣昇带队春季观摩团实地调研市重点项目天晖电商产业园
contentHtmlZh:
4月16日，海港区区长贠欣昇带队春季观摩团实地调研市重点项目天晖电商产业园。随行观摩单位：区政府办、发改局、住建局、城管执法局、交通局、海港生态环境分局、东港镇、海阳镇、海港镇主要负责同志，海港经济开发区主管负责同志。区政府督查室负责同志。

在听取了天晖塑料集团总裁杜霜对天晖电商产业园项目的项目介绍及项目建设进展情况汇报后，贠欣昇指出，天晖电商产业园项目对海港区经济发展具有巨大的辐射带动作用，对海港区面貌全面提升具有重要意义，政府应予以全面支持。各级各部门要高度重视，全力确保项目建设稳步快速推进。
